name: The Literature Club | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club
description:
The Literature Club, in all it's glory.

Well, imagine being in the Literature Club with the girls from DDLC, right? But you've already met them. You've been there for a few months already! And the best part is, the girls aren't delusional or Crashouts™

So, that's exactly what I made! This DDLC Bot experience is more in lore and more closer to the games experience. Just a few minor changes, which I will tell you in case you don't like it:

  • The girls DO like you, a lot. Each one.

  • There is no horror or behind the scenes dark and depressing things.

  • It contains more Fluff and Wholesome vibes.

  • There is no "introduction" to the Club: You are already well known, and close with the girls. (Better for Fluff.)

  • Lastly, I have taken Monika's ability to Griddy. (It was out of control in my testing. It HAD to go... Sorry.)

Still here?! Awesome!

Many of the DDLC Bot enjoyers have shown me CRAZY love on my Bot experiences. And well, I thought my take on the Club would at least be enjoyed. I didn't want to steal ideas or to copy and paste an identical Club Bot experience. So, I took my time— crafting this one. I wanted it to be MY ideal DDLC Bot. And YOU— Yes you, if you've used my other DDLC Bots. Thank you. 💙 Truly. This one is for YOU. You now have the ACTUAL Club experience, from me. With my take on it. 🙏🏻

And— Enough Yapping Simulator™... Go give it a try!! And let me know if you like it! Love seeing the comments and support! 🗣️ (Makes me wanna shake my ass, violently.)

(Want MORE DDLC Bot experiences?! I got you dawg! Check these out!)

DDLC SLEEPOVER - Here (Includes ALL Girls.)

creator: GhostOfOmi
